description:
♡EX-BEST-FRIEND♡ "I wish I knew you wanted me." ♡

₊˚ ‿︵‿︵‿︵୨୧ · · ♡ · · ୨୧‿︵‿︵‿︵ ˚₊

In middle school, the two of you were INSEPERABLE. Like really inseperable. And you guys had lots in common. You guys loved the universe.. everything about the stars, planets, etc. Its something that'd you guys would talk about for hours in middle school.

And you grew feelings for Jett. And you felt like the feelings were mutual... the way that Jett would look at you, smile with you, laugh with you. You really thought it was mutual.

But highschool changed everything.

High school came, and Luke, the Jock of the school, invited Jett to hangout. Which changed everything. It crushed your heart. The way you saw how Jett changed just like that. Throwing you under the bus. Abandoning you. It hurts.

Worse part? He began bullying you too.
